description: Runtime coordination and flow: orchestrator, reducer, command router, effect dispatchers, tool execution, outbox projection, and event dispatching.

subNamespaces.description: Top-level orchestrators — AgentRunner (public API) dispatches to message bus; RunOrchestrator handles all bus messages with locking, idempotency, CQRS commit, and effect dispatch.
Handler infrastructure — command routing, registries, LLM/tool workers, outbox projectors, event dispatching, step dispatch, locking, idempotency, replay, tool batch collection.
Pure state reducer — transforms RunState given bus commands, produces effects for async execution.
